name: El Salvador Apaneca Santa Elena Pacamara Honey 250g — Medium+ (clean points)
author: Gene Cafe Roast Profilist
description:
Medium+ (Full City+ range) for 250g Pacamara Honey from El Salvador (Apaneca-Ilamatepec, 1850m). Aim: caramel/milk-chocolate sweetness + almond depth with a small cherry/fruity edge.

Gene Cafe notes:
- Preheat empty to 205°C until stable.
- External fast cooling after DROP.

Timing formats in events:
- Elapsed mm:ss
- Gene-decimal minutes (min + sec/60, rounded to 0.1)
- Remaining time on Gene display (from 14:00)

Targets:
- Drying end ~04:30–05:00 (yellowing)
- 1C goal window ~10:00–10:45
- Development goal ~03:00–03:30 after 1C start (≈22–26% dev ratio)
- Drop at first signs of 2C (faster ticking) or just before for cleaner cup.

beanInfo.origin: El Salvador — Apaneca Ilamatepec (Santa Elena / Ilamatepec terroir); Producer: Fernando Lima

events.label: Charge / Start (Drying)
events.instruction:
Preheat empty to 205°C until stable.
Load 250g. Set 14:00 total. Set 165°C and press Start.
Elapsed 00:00 (0.0) | Remaining 14:00 (14.0)

events.label: End Drying → 235°C
events.instruction:
Target: clear yellowing. Now increase to 235°C for Maillard.
Elapsed 04:30 (4.5) | Remaining 09:30 (9.5)

events.label: Watch for 1C soon
events.instruction:
Start listening closely for first crack (distinct snaps). Expect approach in the next 1–2 minutes.
Elapsed 09:00 (9.0) | Remaining 05:00 (5.0)

events.label: Push to 242°C (help 1C)
events.instruction:
If 1C hasn't started, this short push helps it arrive cleanly. If 1C is already rolling hard, you can skip this and go straight to development control.
Elapsed 09:45 (9.8) | Remaining 04:15 (4.2)

events.label: Development Control → 228°C
events.instruction:
Set 228°C to manage development toward Medium+ without scorching.
Aim to DROP at first signs of 2C (faster ticking) or just before.
Elapsed 11:00 (11.0) | Remaining 03:00 (3.0)

events.label: DROP / Cool
events.instruction:
Drop now. Eject and cool externally fast (fan).

Next roast tweaks:
- Too dark/smoky: drop 15–30s earlier OR make dev setpoint 225–226°C.
- Too light/peanutty: extend 15–30s OR hold 242°C for +15–30s before stepping down.
- Baked/flat: shorten drying hold by 30s or raise Maillard setpoint to 238°C.
Elapsed 14:00 (14.0) | Remaining 00:00 (0.0)
